hypotheses.name: M1 null seed offset degeneracy
hypotheses.falsification_protocol: D-002I-P1/H1 -- re-run null audit only with alternative null_seed_offset_M1 in {100000, 1000000, hash_mixed}
hypotheses.support_criterion: aggregate_verdict flips FAIL -> PASS for at least one alternative offset
hypotheses.refutation_criterion: all alternative offsets retain aggregate_verdict == FAIL

hypotheses.name: M3 generator over-fit to precursor marginals
hypotheses.falsification_protocol: D-002I-P1/H2 -- re-run null audit only with tol_marginal in {0.01, 0.005, 0.001}
hypotheses.support_criterion: aggregate_verdict flips FAIL -> PASS for at least one tighter tolerance
hypotheses.refutation_criterion: all tighter tolerances retain aggregate_verdict == FAIL

hypotheses.name: Signal genuinely below permutation-detectable threshold
hypotheses.scope: signal-magnitude interpretation only; no substrate code edit; no D-002H prereg edit
hypotheses.falsification_protocol: D-002I-P1/H3 -- parametrise lambda scaling at the runner level only (no substrate edit); evaluate on doubled-lambda grid {0.0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.4, 0.8, 2.0}
hypotheses.support_criterion: null audit verdict flips FAIL -> PASS with augmented signal
hypotheses.refutation_criterion: signal augmentation does not change the null audit verdict

hypotheses.name: Bonferroni n_cells=216 over-correction
hypotheses.scope: Bonferroni denominator interpretation only; does NOT change D-002H pre-reg; does NOT re-run canonical sweep
hypotheses.falsification_protocol: D-002I-P1/H4 -- re-derive verdict from existing sweep capsule with n_cells=18; do NOT re-run sweep
hypotheses.support_criterion: R1 AND R2 AND R3 conjunction flips for at least one cell when n_cells=18 PROVIDED NULL_AUDIT separately PASSes
hypotheses.refutation_criterion: no R2 verdict change with n_cells=18, OR NULL_AUDIT still FAILs (which renders H_I4 moot)

forbidden_claims: D-002I authorises a new canonical sweep
canonical sweep will re-run on a new substrate set
allowed_claims: each hypothesis produces a SUPPORTED or REFUTED scoped verdict
investigation outcomes inform whether D-002J (mechanism redesign) is warranted
D-002H REFUSED stays the truthful canonical verdict regardless of D-002I outcomes
